title: gnome-session bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[40.1.1-11.0.1]
- Remove subscription-manager dependency

[40.1.1-11]
- Add race fixes needed when terminating a conflicting session
  on GDM greeter.
  Resolves: RHEL-92341
full_text:
[40.1.1-11.0.1]
- Remove subscription-manager dependency

[40.1.1-11]
- Add race fixes needed when terminating a conflicting session
  on GDM greeter.
  Resolves: RHEL-92341

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20758.html
